expectations.text: Output begins with the literal line `Findings:`
Review Scope explicitly indicates no task is identified (e.g., `Review Scope: No task identified` or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: No 'Review Scope' line present at all

expectations.text: The output does NOT invent a task ID, ticket number, or fictional issue reference
expectations.evidence: No task ID is invented; output simply does not mention tickets

expectations.text: Process Context indicates Lightweight process or Unable to determine
expectations.evidence: No 'Process Context' line appears in the output

expectations.text: Integration Target is named (`main`) or marked Unable to determine
expectations.evidence: Last line mentions 'safe to merge to `main`' (Integration Target named informally)

expectations.text: Architecture/Feature Spec/PRD references are each marked `None applicable` or equivalent
expectations.evidence: No reference fields are present in the output

expectations.text: The actual change (off-by-one fix) is recognized as correct — either no findings emitted, or a positive verification of the fix logic
expectations.evidence: Output: 'Yep, the fix is right' with a sanity-check table showing old (wrong) vs new (correct) results

expectations.text: If no findings, the output emits `No findings.` and `Residual Risks / Gaps:`
expectations.evidence: Output emits no 'No findings.' line and no 'Residual Risks / Gaps:' line

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
